creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to rainer from comment #4)

I wouldn't worry about the timeline for the 2015Q2 cut; since this is a security fix, this justifies merging to the quarterly branch.  I have the patch for vuxml to show it during pkg audit in the lang/php5 at https://bugs.freebsd.org/198993.  The PHP project documents the same 3 CVE's for all 3 PHP versions so it should just be the one entry.
